title: chamaeiris graminea
intro: Chamaeiris graminea is a plant species commonly known as the lesser butterfly orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Chamaeiris graminea has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of fever, colds, and digestive issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Chamaeiris graminea is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
